# Chapter 8: Vectors and vector calculus  (~100 pp)
- 8.1 Vectors as algebraic and geometric objects (10)
- 8.2 Dot and cross products (12)
- 8.3 Coordinate systems and transformations (12)
- 8.4 Curves: parametrisation, arc length, curvature (12)
- 8.5 Surfaces: parametrisation, normals, area (12)
- 8.6 Gradient, divergence, curl (15)
- 8.7 Stokes, Gauss, Green: the three integral theorems (15)
- 8.8 Failure section: orientation errors and the sign-of-the-normal problem (12)

**Archetype**: balance, transport. **Project**: use the divergence theorem to derive the volume of a household object from its surface. **Exercises**: 35.
